locked_art_direction.style: Chinese ink-and-wash digital character art: realistic bone planes, directional calligraphic dry-brush, ink-led value masses, lost-and-found edges, and selective antique-gold accents
locked_art_direction.material_rule: broad ink-dark and umber planes with sparse edge accents; no glossy chrome, plastic highlights, or dense engraved micro-detail
locked_art_direction.edge_rule: keep face and identity anchors crisp while selected robe, hair, plume, cloak, and armor edges dissolve into controlled broken brush

pose_expression_policy.default_forbidden: centered front-facing level-shouldered stern passport-photo pose
pose_expression_policy.batch_rule: change at least two variation axes between adjacent characters
pose_expression_policy.avatar_rule: preserve the approved half-body emotional read

standard_outputs.composition: narrow upper body: crown, face, shoulders, chest, upper abdomen
large face, eyes near center, minimal empty space
same large-face avatar within circular safe area
